view.title: IDomain {hostname}
view.name: Igama:
view.allGoodNoErrors: Yonke ilungile! Akukho mpazamo kulwazi lokuQhagamshelana!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuthumela kwakhona i-imeyili yamkelo?
view.welcomeEmailResent: I-imeyili yamkelo ithunyiwe kwakhona. Jonga ibhokisi yakho yongeno.

order.premiumAvailable: Ewe! IDomain yakho {domain} iyafumaneka kwaye iyidomain yezinga eliphezulu. Ukubhalisa ngokuzenzekelayo kukhubazile. Thumela imeyili ku-{email} ukuba ufuna ukuthenga le domain ngo-{cost} ngonyaka.
order.premiumTaken: Uxolo! IDomain yakho {domain} seyithathiwe! Sele uyinini? Unayithengisa, kwaye iyidomain yezinga eliphezulu. Ukubhalisa ngokuzenzekelayo kukhubazile. Thumela imeyili ku-{email} ukuba ufuna ukuthenga le domain ngo-{cost} ngonyaka.
order.available: Ewe! IDomain yakho {domain} iyafumaneka! Unayibhalisa ngo-{cost}. Intengo yokuvuselela iya kuba yi-{renewal}.
order.taken: Uxolo! IDomain yakho {domain} seyithathiwe! Sele uyinini? Unayithengisa ngo-{cost}. Intengo yokuvuselela iya kuba yi-{renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: Isivumelwano siya kuvuselela ngokuzenzekelayo emva konyaka wonke ngo-{cost} ude urhoxise.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: Ngokuphawula le bhokisi, uyavuma ukuba uyathenga iproducthi yesivumelwano evuselela ngokuzenzekelayo (Njengoko Imiqathango Echazwe Ngentla) kwaye ihlawulwa kwikhadi loLwabelwano oluphetheyo namhlanje. Ukuba ufuna ukurhoxisa ukuvuselela kwakho ngokuzenzekelayo, unayifikelela kwiwebhu yomxhasi (Apha) ukhethe inkonzo esebenzayo uwuloke isixhobo sokurhoxisa okanye uthumele imeyili ku: billing{'@'}interserver.net okanye usebenzise enye indlela echazwe kuMiqathango neeMeko. Ngokuphawula ibhokisi kwaye ucofe Beka i-odola yam ngezantsi, uyavuma ubuye wafunda, uyaqonda, kwaye uyavuma neMiqathango neeMeko neNqubela yaBuMfihlo bethu.

nameservers.title: Iiseva zamagama eDomain
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Iiseva zamagama eziCetyiswayo zisebenzisiwe. Cofa Hlaziya ukugcina.

eppCode.title: Thumela ikhodi ye-EPP nge-imeyili
eppCode.confirmMessage: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuthumela ikhodi ye-EPP kwi-imeyili ebhalisiweyo?

whois.title: Ubumfihlo beWhois
whois.renewalNote: Ubumfihlo beWhois buvuselela rhoqo iminyaka eli-12 ukusuka kumhla wokuqaliswa. Intengo yokuvuselela kwengezelelwa lobuMfihlo beWhois ngo-{cost}.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Ubumfihlo bolunxibelelwano bufihla isazisi soMbhaliswa xa umsebenzisi enza uplilo lwe-WHOIS kwidomain yalowo Mbhaliswa.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: Inzuzo yokuNa Ubumfihlo bolunxibelelwano kukuba isazisi soMbhaliswa, kuquka idilesi yasekhaya, inombolo yemnxeba, nedilesi ye-imeyili, ikhuselekile kwabahlaseli be-spam, amasela ezazisi nabahadisi.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: Xa ooMbhaliswa bevula inkonzo yobuMfihlo bolunxibelelwano, ulwazi lonxibelelwano olufihlakeleyo lubonakala kwisiseko sedatha ye-WHOIS yoluntu.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Ubumfihlo bolunxibelelwano bufumaneka ngo-{cost} ngomhla ngomhla ngonyaka.
whois.enableNow: Ukuvula Ubumfihlo bolunxibelelwano kweDomain yakho, Beka i-odola Ngoku.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Intengo yobuMfihlo beWhois: {cost} ngonyaka. Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukubeka le odola?
whois.enableMessage: IDomain yakho {hostname} inezongezelo lobuMfihlo beWhois ohlawulweyo ongekavulwa. Ufuna ukuvula ngoku?
whois.disableMessage: IDomain yakho {hostname} Ubumfihlo beWhois buvuliwe okwangoku. Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukukhubaza kwaye urhoxise?

whoisToggle.title: Izongezelo lobuMfihlo beWhois
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: IDomain yakho {domain} izongezelo lobuMfihlo beWhois liVuliwe
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: IDomain yakho {domain} izongezelo lobuMfihlo beWhois liKhubazile
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukukhubaza kwaye urhoxise?

dnssec.title: Ulwazi lwe-DNSSEC
dnssec.enterDigest: Faka inani le-Digest (Akufanele kudlule izinhlamvu eziyi-{max})
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: Oku kuya kususa amarekhodi onke e-DNSSEC ale domain.
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Nceda uzalise ubuncinane irekhodi enye ye-DNSSEC.

renew.title: Vuselela
renew.tip1: IDomain kufuneka ivuselele ngomhla wokuphela okanye ngaphambi kwawo.
renew.tip2: Ukuba idomain iphelelwe ingaba nexesha lokuncedisana ukusuka kumhla wokuphela ukuvuselela.
renew.tip3: Vula Ubumfihlo beWhois ukufihla Ulwazi lwakho lokuQhagamshelana xa umsebenzisi enza uplilo lwe-WHOIS kwidomain yalowo Mbhaliswa.
renew.payExistingInvoice: Ukuvuselela idomain yakho, nceda uhlawule ifatshi ekhona.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Intengo yonke: {cost}. Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukubeka le odola yokuvuselela?
